unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* And now for the protocols */
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */
/* Some parts of the code (e.g. chunked encoding) assume this buffer has at * more than just a few bytes to play with. Don't let it become too small or * bad things will happen. */
/* Reject URLs exceeding this length */

/* * get_protocol_family() * * This is used to return the protocol family for a given protocol. * * Parameters: * * 'h' [in] - struct Curl_handler pointer. * * Returns the family as a single bit protocol identifier. */

function.name: get_protocol_family
Curl_freeset

unit.comment: /* free the URL pieces */

function.name: up_free

unit.comment: /* * This is the internal function curl_easy_cleanup() calls. This should * cleanup and free all resources associated with this sessionhandle. * * We ignore SIGPIPE when this is called from curl_easy_cleanup. */

function.name: Curl_close

unit.comment: /* * Initialize the UserDefined fields within a Curl_easy. * This may be safely called on a new or existing Curl_easy. */

function.name: Curl_init_userdefined

unit.comment: /** * Curl_open() * * @param curl is a pointer to a sessionhandle pointer that gets set by this * function. * @return CURLcode */

function.name: Curl_open
conn_shutdown
conn_free

unit.comment: /* * Disconnects the given connection. Note the connection may not be the * primary connection, like when freeing room in the connection cache or * killing of a dead old connection. * * A connection needs an easy handle when closing down. We support this passed * in separately since the connection to get closed here is often already * disassociated from an easy handle. * * This function MUST NOT reset state in the Curl_easy struct if that * isn't strictly bound to the life-time of *this* particular connection. * */

function.name: Curl_disconnect

unit.comment: /* * IsMultiplexingPossible() * * Return a bitmask with the available multiplexing options for the given * requested connection. */

function.name: IsMultiplexingPossible
proxy_info_matches
socks_proxy_info_matches

unit.comment: /* disabled, won't get called */

function.name: conn_maxage
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct connectdata *conn, struct curltime now)

unit.comment: /* * This function checks if the given connection is dead and extracts it from * the connection cache if so. * * When this is called as a Curl_conncache_foreach() callback, the connection * cache lock is held! * * Returns TRUE if the connection was dead and extracted. */

function.name: extract_if_dead

unit.comment: /* * Wrapper to use extract_if_dead() function in Curl_conncache_foreach() * */

function.name: call_extract_if_dead

unit.comment: /* * This function scans the connection cache for half-open/dead connections, * closes and removes them. The cleanup is done at most once per second. * * When called, this transfer has no connection attached. */

function.name: prune_dead_connections
ssh_config_matches

unit.comment: /* * Given one filled in connection struct (named needle), this function should * detect if there already is one that has all the significant details * exactly the same and thus should be used instead. * * If there is a match, this function returns TRUE - and has marked the * connection as 'in-use'. It must later be called with ConnectionDone() to * return back to 'idle' (unused) state. * * The force_reuse flag is set if the connection must be used. */

function.name: ConnectionExists
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct connectdata *needle, struct connectdata **usethis, bool *force_reuse, bool *waitpipe)

function.name: Curl_verboseconnect
allocate_conn
Curl_get_scheme_handler

unit.comment: /* returns the handler if the given scheme is built-in */

function.name: Curl_getn_scheme_handler
findprotocol
Curl_uc_to_curlcode

unit.comment: /* * If the URL was set with an IPv6 numerical address with a zone id part, set * the scope_id based on that! */

function.name: zonefrom_url

unit.comment: /* defined(USE_HTTP2) || defined(USE_HTTP3) */
